footer.description: Modern application for <recording>screen recording</recording> and <editing>video editing</editing>. Designed for the web. No installations, no waiting, directly in your browser.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At openvid, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your data when you use our platform.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect the following information when you use openvid:
items: Account information (email, name) if you register via Google
Usage and analytics data to improve the experience
Technical information such as browser type and operating system
Videos and content you process (only temporarily, never stored on servers)

processing.title: Video Processing
processing.badge: All video processing happens entirely in your browser using modern web technologies (WebAssembly, FFmpeg.wasm). Your videos are never uploaded to our servers. The entire process is local and private.

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
cookies.note: You can configure your browser to reject cookies, but this may affect the application's functionality.

sharing.title: Sharing Information
sharing.content: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:
items: To protect our rights and security

security.title: Security
security.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your information:

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our service is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from minors.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, you can contact us through our GitHub repository.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.content: By using openvid, you also accept our <terms>Terms of Service</terms>.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using openvid, you agree to be legally bound by these terms of service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you should not use our platform.

description.title: Service Description
description.content: openvid is a web application for video editing that allows users to:
items: Record the screen directly from the browser
Export in multiple formats and qualities

account.title: User Account
account.content: To access certain features, you may need to create an account through:
account.note: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.

acceptable.title: Acceptable Use
acceptable.content: By using openvid, you agree to:
items: Not upload illegal, offensive, or copyright-infringing content
Not attempt to compromise the service's security
Not use the platform for fraudulent activities
Respect the rights of other users

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: You retain all rights to the content you upload to openvid. We only process your videos temporarily to provide the editing service. We do not store or share your content without your explicit consent.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: openvid is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not responsible for:

modifications.title: Service Modifications
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time without prior notice. We may also update these terms periodically.

law.title: Applicable Law
law.content: These terms are governed by the applicable laws in your jurisdiction. Any disputes will be resolved in the competent courts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about these terms, you can contact us through our GitHub repository.

acceptance2.content: By using openvid, you also accept our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

hero.title: Create demos and <screen>screen</screen>
hero.description: Add smooth zooms, mockups, customize backgrounds, camera, audio, elements, and export professional demos.
hero.uploadHint: Drag a video or click to select

steps.title: Create your shot in
steps.subtitle: Follow these instructions to capture your screen. The whole process happens in your browser, no installation required.

step1.title: Start capturing
step1.description: Click the button below. Your browser will ask you what you want to share. For optimal performance and cleaner shots, we recommend selecting a <tab>Tab</tab> or <window>Specific window</window>.
step1.mobileAlert: Screen recording is not available on mobile devices. Please use a desktop computer.

step2.title: Hide distractions
step2.description: When sharing your screen, your browser will automatically show a floating bar notifying that the capture is active. Click <hide>Hide</hide> to make sure it doesn't appear in your final video.

step3.title: Get ready for action
step3.description: No rush. Once you approve the permissions in step 1, we will start a <countdown>3-second</countdown> countdown. You will see the indicator in the browser tab so you know exactly when to start speaking or moving the mouse.

visual.title: Switch tabs!
visual.subtitle: The recording will start on the screen you selected.

step4.title: Cut and to the editor
step4.description: When you finish your explanation, simply stop the recording. The file will not be downloaded immediately; it will magically move to our web editor so you can apply zooms, backgrounds, and crops.

countdown.title: Switch tabs now!
countdown.subtitle: Recording will start on the screen you selected.

processing.title: Processing your recording
processing.subtitle: Preparing your video for the editor...

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Choose your preferred method to continue
login.disclaimer: By continuing, you accept our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

errors.generic: Error signing in. Please try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The route you are looking for does not exist in our editor.

page.title: Support the development
page.description: openvid is an open-source tool. Your contribution allows us to keep the servers running and continue developing new features.

yape.detail: Scan the QR or use the phone number

paypal.detail: Send via email or direct link

recordingSetup.description: Choose your camera, microphone, and how you want your bubble to look.

camera.description: Add a bubble with your webcam.

camera.errorGeneric: Could not access the camera. Check your connection.

mic.title: Microphone
mic.description: Record your voice on the same track.

systemAudio.description: Capture audio from the shared tab or window.

mockup.title: Mockup Generator
mockup.description: Wrap your captures in browsers, mobile devices, or IDEs

videos.description: Upload your screen recordings or clips

audio.title: Tracks & Effects
audio.description: Sync background music tracks or sound effects

zoom.title: Dynamic Zoom
zoom.description: Create smooth close-ups on specific parts of the screen to guide the viewer's attention.

camera.title: On-screen Camera
camera.description: Overlay your webcam recording with circular crops

history.title: Image History
history.description: Access your previous captures to reuse or edit them.

motion.title: Motion Effects
motion.description: Apply smooth transitions and animations to your elements.

alerts.mobile: Screen capture is not supported on mobile. Use your computer.

warnings.transparency: This process may take longer than usual. <highlight>WebM export with transparency</highlight> requires additional CPU processing.
